question: For the `MyString` class, implement the copy assignment operator (`=`) to ensure proper deep copying and handle self-assignment.

test_cases.input: MyString s1("Hello"); MyString s2("World"); MyString s3; s3 = s1;
test_cases.expected:
s1: Hello, Length: 5
s2: World, Length: 5
s3 after s3 = s1: Hello, Length: 5

test_cases.input: MyString s4("Test string that is quite long"); MyString s5("Short"); s4 = s5;
test_cases.expected: s4 after s4 = s5: Short, Length: 5
s6 after self-assignment: Another test, Length: 12
